scripts.install-dsi-4:
sudo bash -c "grep -q 'vc4-kms-dsi-waveshare-panel-v2,4_0_inch_c' /boot/firmware/config.txt || echo '
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-v3d
#DSI1 Use
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-waveshare-panel-v2,4_0_inch_c
#DSI0 Use
# dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-waveshare-panel-v2,4_0_inch_c,dsi0' >> /boot/firmware/config.txt"
scripts.run: npm run backend & npm run frontend
scripts.create-shortcut:
printf '[Desktop Entry]
Type=Application
Name=Oko
Exec=lxterminal -e bash -i -c "cd %s && ./run.sh; exec bash"
Terminal=false
' "$INIT_CWD" > ~/Desktop/oko.desktop && chmod +x ~/Desktop/oko.desktop && echo 'Shortcut created: ~/Desktop/oko.desktop'
scripts.frontend: npm -w @wojciechjerzy/oko-frontend run dev & sleep 2 && chromium --start-fullscreen --no-first-run --disable-infobars --disable-session-crashed-bubble --password-store=basic --touch-events=enabled http://localhost:8080
